# Internal Fixture Footprint Diagnosis Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Inspect repository and app footprint.
- Explain maintenance cost and structural health.

## Workflow

1. Measure repository and app footprint without changing code.
2. Summarize footprint diagnosis and maintenance risk.
